---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the AI Gateway
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: cp50

---

## Problem this solves
What problem or limitation does this feature address?

## Proposed solution
How should it work? Be as specific as possible.

## Which layer does this affect?
- [ ] Intent detection (embeddingRouter.js)
- [ ] Routing logic (router.js)
- [ ] Model execution (modelCaller.js)
- [ ] Caching (cache.js)
- [ ] Tenant system (tenantStore.js)
- [ ] Observability (systemMetrics.js)
- [ ] Provider adapter (providers/)
- [ ] New feature / other

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional context
Any examples, references, or related projects.
